title: brain source add — --json success output
description: Record a source in the v2 operational `source` registry (0015_source_registry). A plain operational SQLite write — NO git commit, NO capture/normalize (that is `ingest`), NO mutation order. Derives kind (file|url) from the locator, generates a stable id, and inserts one row deduped on the UNIQUE locator. A duplicate locator is a NOOP SUCCESS returning the existing id (added:false), so a repeated add is intrinsically idempotent.

id.description: The registry row id (the new one on insert; the pre-existing one on a dedup noop).

kind.description: Derived from the locator: a <scheme>:// locator is `url`, else `file`.

locator.description: The file path or URL locating the source (the UNIQUE dedup key).

title.description: Optional human title (only present when --title was given).

added.description: True when a new row was inserted; false on a dedup noop (the locator was already registered).

x-atlas-contract.summary: Record a source in the operational registry; dedup on locator is a noop success.

args.name: <locator>
args.description: A file path or URL locating the source.

sideEffects: inserts one row into the operational `source` registry (0015_source_registry)
prohibitedEffects: no git commit or canonical-ref move

errorCodes.when: the ledger is absent or not migrated (run `brain db migrate`)
